patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Voruna’s Fangs of Raksh passive preventing melee blocking (auto and manual).

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Fang Prime and Dual Ether having the incorrect Mastery Rank requirement.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some weapon trail placements on the Fang and Dual Skanas.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing sounds on Fang Prime / Dual Ether Dagger melee attacks.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Fang Prime has been given the PBR treatment.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes: 10 Exposure points: Set of 4 Mods – Buzz Kill, Fanged Fusillade, Sweeping Serration and Maim

patchlogs.name: 13.4.0: Serro + Psa!
patchlogs.fixes: New Melee Combos have been added to Crossing Snakes, Seismic Palm, and Decisive Judgement Fracturing Wind, Seismic Palm, Homing Fang, Swirling Tiger, Grim Fury, Flailing Branch, and the Decisive Judgement Stance Mods! (rest maybe coming soon!).
